candidate.description: Routing messages that repeatedly fail processing to a dedicated queue for inspection and manual recovery.

l2s.scope_1line: Queue for messages that exceed retry limits; enables postmortem analysis.
Progressive delay between retry attempts to avoid overwhelming downstream.
Identifying messages that reliably crash consumers and isolating them.

l1s.scope_1line: Asynchronous decoupling of producers and consumers via durable queues.
Non-blocking execution of work outside request path.
